title: alyssum montanum subsp. cuneifolium
intro: Alyssum montanum subsp. cuneifolium, also known as mountain alyssum, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and acting as an expectorant to help relieve congestion. Alyssum montanum subsp. cuneifolium can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
